title: SPAIN enforcement action against MALAGASUITE SHOWROOM, S.L. (2,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on MALAGASUITE SHOWROOM, S.L. The controller collected guest identification data for the purpose of tourist accommodation. While the controller had a sufficient legal basis for processing the data, the controller failed to adequately inform the...
